chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6169 of 2014 Sarfraz Hussain Versus Abdul Khaliq & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 32460/14 2. For orders on CMA 32461/14 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 07.03.2024 None present. -.-.- This petition was filed on 19.11.2014 and ever since it was filed petitioner has not even cared to have the notices issued. On the first date of hearing counsel for the petitioner sought adjournment on account of his illness followed by an order of 13.09.2018 when his brief was held. On 22.05.2019 at the request of petitioner’s counsel the matter was adjourned followed by his absence on 28.08.2019 when as an indulgence the matter was adjourned. Today position is same. Neither petitioner nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. The matter is pending since last about nine years but even the notices have not been issued. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
